tools.description: Return one compact journey-first operator cockpit across attention, queue, runs, readiness, and publication state.

attention_limit.description: Maximum attention and queue items per window (1-50).

cursor.description: Zero-based offset into the full attention record lists for paging.

detail.description: Full-detail (true) vs compact (false); overrides 'mode' when supplied.

mode.description: Packet altitude: 'full' (default) or 'compact' (thinned, bounded under the token cap).

sections.description: Optional subset of cockpit sections to emit.

tools.name: attention.cockpit

summary.description: Bounded attention counts and readiness summary.

tools.title: Attention Cockpit

tools.description: Return a read-only KB Stewardship lifecycle review packet for an object family, entity type, entity group, or entity.

dry_run.description: Optional compatibility assertion; lifecycle.review is always read-only and only accepts true.

target.description: Lifecycle review target, such as situations or accounts.

today.description: Optional YYYY-MM-DD evaluation date for deterministic tests.

tools.name: lifecycle.review
tools.title: Lifecycle Review

tools.description: Return workspace Git publication state plus workflow and confirmed-control publication policy.

paths.description: Optional workspace-relative paths to scope publication status.

transaction_id.description: Optional confirmed-control transaction id to echo in the receipt.

tools.name: publication.status

ok.description: Whether publication state is currently acceptable.

tools.title: Publication Status

tools.description: Apply the same confirmed review inbox decision to a batch of proposals through one previewed confirmed-control envelope.

actor.description: Human or agent actor requesting the confirmed write.

cursor_id.description: Guided KB Review Session cursor id from the preview lease.

decision_scope.description: Explicit scope confirmed by the preview lease.

episode_id.description: Optional broader conversation or run id.

note.description: Optional decision note applied to each proposal.

confirm_tool.description: Only confirmation tool allowed for this lease.

decisions_hash.description: Digest of the ordered decision rows.

preview_hash.description: Digest of the preview-bound lease fields.

proposal_ids_hash.description: Digest of the ordered proposal ids.

review_session_id.description: Guided KB Review Session id from the preview lease.

session_id.description: Stable harness session id for idempotency provenance.

source.description: Harness or channel provenance, such as Hermes / Telegram.

stop_on_error.description: Stop confirmed execution after the first error.

confirm_tool.description: Only confirmation tool allowed for this lease.

decisions_hash.description: Digest of the ordered decision rows.

preview_hash.description: Digest of the preview-bound lease fields.

proposal_ids_hash.description: Digest of the ordered proposal ids.

affected_ids.description: Exact object identities bound to this request.

confirmed.description: True only for the user-confirmed request.

decision.description: Exact decision applied to every affected proposal.

idempotency_key.description: Engine idempotency key bound to this request.

preview_digest.description: Digest of the exact preview or request plan confirmed by the user.

preview_lease_id.description: Preview lease or versioned request id bound to confirmation.

request_digest.description: Digest of the exact confirmed tool request.

transaction_id.description: Transaction or idempotency identity for this exact request.

ok.description: Whether the exact confirmed request and readback succeeded.

tools.description: Preview one or more review inbox decisions through deterministic control validation without applying changes.

decision_scope.description: Explicit scope for ambiguous batch language.

displayed_count.description: Displayed/viewed item count for the current cursor window.

proposal_ids.description: Proposal ids to decide as a batch.

review_session_id.description: Optional Guided KB Review Session id.

session_id.description: Optional review session id to bind the preview lease.

source.description: Optional source label for preview provenance.

stop_on_error.description: Stop preview execution after the first error.

tools.description: Plan a confirmed workflow start request, including readiness, provenance, idempotency, and preconditions, without starting the workflow.

force.description: Whether a future confirmed start may bypass queue pressure.

harness_offers.description: Ephemeral runtime capability offers supplied by the calling harness.

queue_gate_limit.description: Pending-review queue threshold that would skip execution.

readiness_mode.description: Readiness probe depth for the request plan.

source.description: Harness or client generating the plan.

workflow_id.description: Explicit workflow id or alias to plan.
